Remark: The overall progress of the project is 99%. All works (Civil/Electrical & Mechanical) of the STP has been completed. Due to the rise in groundwater levels resulting from floods in the Ganga River and rainfall, the construction of the remaining 01 number of Manhole near the STP premises and the Dewatering work remained disrupted from August 2025 to January 2026. Against the Dewatering and dewatering works in 1200 mm RCC Pipe are in progress and dewatering work is being done in a length of 50 meters ahead of MH 37, which will be completed by the concessionaire M/s Kanpur River Management Pvt. Ltd., Kanpur by 15 June 2026
